title: jasminum heterophyllum var. subhumile
intro: Jasminum heterophyllum var. subhumile is a low-growing, prostrate variant of the Jasminum heterophyllum plant, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its spreading habit and small, white, star-shaped flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Jasminum heterophyllum var. subhumile include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
